task: Calculate the estimated car loan payment amount for an average credit-rated person for a 15,000-dollar car with a down payment of 2000 dollars and loan tenure of 48 months in zip 65215 and shop for the lowest-priced car.
graderReasoning: The agent completed both parts of the task on Cars.com. It used the Cars.com loan calculator with the requested inputs: car price $15,000, down payment $2,000, average credit rating, 48-month term, and ZIP 65215. The calculator page visibly showed an estimate of $391/month, based on 14.5% APR, with estimated sales tax 7.97% and total loan amount $14,196. Then the agent opened the budget shopping results, updated the ZIP to 65215 (page refreshed to Columbia, MO), sorted results by Lowest price, and the results page showed the first/lowest listing as a Used 2007 Honda Pilot EX-L for $6,000 in Columbia, MO. Opening the listing confirmed the vehicle and price. This satisfies calculating the payment and shopping for the lowest-priced car.
final_result_response:
Done.

action_history: Opening Cars.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.cars.com/');
Opening car loan calculator: await page.locator('e168').click();
Opening budget search from calculator: await page.locator('e42').click();
Updating listings location and sort: await page.locator('e264').fill('65215');
Updating listings location and sort: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
